files.Title: ProjectName.Mcp.FileSystem.Configuration.FileSystemConfig
files.Summary: I AM the FileSystemConfig. I define the single root boundary that constrains all file system tool operations.

files.Title: ProjectName.Mcp.FileSystem.Prompts.FileSystemPrompts
files.Summary:
I AM the FileSystemPrompts Provider. I give phase agents ready-made mission briefs for exploring and modifying the workspace.

SDK ground truth (ModelContextProtocol C# SDK v1.0.0): Prompt methods return IEnumerable<ChatMessage> (Microsoft.Extensions.AI). The class must NOT be static (see FRAC-PW-PROMPT-001), but methods remain static.

files.Title: ProjectName.Mcp.FileSystem.Resources.FileSystemResources
files.Summary: I AM the FileSystemResources Provider. I expose sandbox configuration and actuator capabilities to the cognitive federation.

files.Title: ProjectName.Mcp.Playwright.Configuration.PlaywrightConfig
files.Summary:
I AM the PlaywrightConfig. I surface environment-driven Playwright settings and sandbox workspace paths.

ARCH-013: No browser or filesystem access escapes this configuration boundary.

Configuration keys (all optional — defaults shown): Parameters:project-root → workspace root for .pmcro/ directory (default: CWD) PLAYWRIGHT_HEADLESS → "false" to run headed (default: headless) Playwright:DefaultTimeoutMs → default page timeout in ms (default: 10000) Playwright:WaitForElementTimeoutMs → WaitForElement cap in ms (default + max: 30000)

PW-LAW-003: WaitForElementTimeoutMs is ALWAYS capped at 30 000 ms regardless of config.

files.Title: ProjectName.Mcp.Playwright.Configuration.PlaywrightSessionManager
files.Summary: I AM the PlaywrightSessionManager. I manage the physical Chromium instance and expose state to the cognitive federation.

files.Title: ProjectName.Mcp.Playwright.Prompts.PlaywrightPrompts
files.Summary: I AM the PlaywrightPrompts Provider — Pillar Three of the Playwright MCP. I give phase agents the rules of engagement for browser automation. Agents MUST read the mission brief before executing browser actions.

files.Title: ProjectName.Mcp.Playwright.Resources.PlaywrightResources
files.Summary: I AM the PlaywrightResources Provider — Pillar Two of the Playwright MCP. I expose browser session state and configuration to the cognitive federation.

files.Title: ProjectName.Mcp.Terminal.Configuration.TerminalConfig
files.Summary: I AM the TerminalConfig. I define the strict boundaries for all shell execution within this actuator.

files.Title: ProjectName.Mcp.Terminal.Prompts.TerminalPrompts
files.Summary: I AM the TerminalPrompts Provider. I give phase agents the rules of engagement for interacting with a non-interactive shell.

files.Title: ProjectName.Mcp.Terminal.Resources.TerminalResources
files.Summary: I AM the TerminalResources Provider. I expose environment metadata to the cognitive federation.

files.Title: ProjectName.OrchestrationApi.Controllers.IntentController
files.Summary: I AM the IntentController. I serve as the sole membrane through which raw human intent enters the PMCRO substrate.

files.Title: ProjectName.OrchestrationApi.Mcp.IMcpClientRegistry
files.Summary: I AM the IMcpClientRegistry. I hold the live AITool collections for each MCP actuator, loaded at startup via McpClientFactory + SseClientTransport. Phase agents pull their tool sets from here at registration time.

files.Title: ProjectName.OrchestrationApi.Mcp.IMcpToolExecutor
files.Summary: I AM the IMcpToolExecutor. I define the contract for TYPE 1 (mutative) tool dispatch via the Orchestrator gate. TYPE 2 (read-only) calls are handled natively by MAF's agentic tool loop.

files.Title: ProjectName.OrchestrationApi.Mcp.McpClientRegistry
files.Summary: I AM the McpClientRegistry. I connect to all MCP actuators at startup, enumerate their tools, and hold live instances for the lifetime of the application.

files.Title: ProjectName.OrchestrationApi.Mcp.McpClientRegistryHolder
files.Summary: Mutable holder registered as singleton — bridging the IHostedService startup result into the DI container without requiring async DI factory support.

files.Title: ProjectName.OrchestrationApi.Mcp.McpRegistryStartupService
files.Summary: I AM the McpRegistryStartupService. I initialise the MCP client connections before the OrchestrationApi accepts its first HTTP request, then register the registry in the DI container so agent factories can pull tools from it at construction time.

files.Title: ProjectName.OrchestrationApi.Mcp.McpToolExecutor
files.Summary: I AM the McpToolExecutor. I execute TYPE 1 (mutative) MCP tool calls on behalf of the Orchestrator gate. I do NOT handle TYPE 2 calls — those are routed natively through MAF's agentic loop.

files.Title: ProjectName.OrchestrationApi.Models.CycleState
files.Summary: I AM the CycleState. I hold the cumulative state of a trail as it moves through the PMCRO graph.

files.Title: ProjectName.OrchestrationApi.Models.IntentEnvelope
files.Summary: I AM the IntentEnvelope — the bloodstream of the PMCRO loop. I carry the high-level goal and evolving state for a PMCRO Trail. Every phase reads and augments me. No field is optional once I am sealed. I MUST have federation_shielded: true before entering the Orchestrator.

files.Title: ProjectName.OrchestrationApi.Models.McpDispatchDecision
files.Summary: TYPE 1 dispatch decision — validated by McpToolExecutor before execution.

files.Title: ProjectName.OrchestrationApi.Models.McpToolResult
files.Summary: Result from an MCP tool call (TYPE 1 gate dispatch).

files.Title: ProjectName.OrchestrationApi.Models.PlannerResponse
files.Summary: Planner output schema. type2_mcp_calls REMOVED (ARCH-MCP-NAT-001) — native MAF tool loop handles reconnaissance.

files.Title: ProjectName.OrchestrationApi.Models.SeedIntentRequest
files.Summary: I AM the SeedIntentRequest. I carry the raw, unrefined human input from the API boundary to the Federation Board.

files.Title: ProjectName.OrchestrationApi.Skills.FederationBoardSkill
files.Summary: I AM the FederationBoardSkill. I refine raw human intent into a sealed IntentEnvelope before anything else runs. I NEVER pass raw seed intent to the Orchestrator — I always refine it first. I ALWAYS run the Economic Gate before sealing the envelope. I ALWAYS tag the origin: federation | round_table | human_refined.

files.Title: ProjectName.OrchestrationApi.Skills.FileSystemSkill
files.Summary: I AM the FileSystemSkill. I provide the test-agent with in-process filesystem capabilities. Phase agents use MCP tools from McpClientRegistry instead (ARCH-MCP-NAT-001).

files.Title: ProjectName.OrchestrationApi.Skills.RefinedSeedResult
files.Summary: The output of Federation Board refinement. Contains both the structured seed data and the sealed IntentEnvelope ready for injection into the PMCRO workflow.

files.Title: ProjectName.OrchestrationApi.Workflows.ConstraintInjectorExecutor
files.Summary: I AM the ConstraintInjectorExecutor. I run after every CheckerExecutor verdict, before the routing switch. I merge QualityFrame.EarnedConstraints into Envelope.LockedConstraints (de-duplicated) so they are available to the Maker on EXTEND and to the Reflector on ACCEPT. Law anchor: ARCH-003 + OrchestratorSkill. EXTEND.

files.Title: ProjectName.ServiceDefaults.IHasInstructions
files.Summary: Contract for AgentClassSkill<T> subclasses that expose their system instructions for injection into ChatOptions.Instructions. Implement this on every skill registered via AddMAFAgent<T>.

files.Title: ProjectName.ServiceDefaults.PmcroSkillsProvider
files.Summary: I AM the PmcroSkillsProvider helper. I resolve the physical path for the SKILL.md skills directory and construct AgentSkillsProvider instances for file-based agent registration.
